publishedAbstract: - "rook-ceph-operator" pods are stuck in ***CreateContainerConfigError***.- Observed error below error from rook-ceph-operator logs ~~~ # oc describe pod-l app=rook-ceph-operator-n openshift-storage | grep "Error" Reason: CreateContainerConfigError Warning Failed 5m39s (x12 over 7m32s) kubelet Error: couldn't find key ROOK_CSI_ENABLE_CEPHFS in ConfigMap openshift-storage/ocs-operator-config ~~~
publishedTitle: Upgrade is not progressing in ODF environment, rook-ceph-opertor Pod failing with "CreateContainerConfigError"
